mapper.select: /** UsptSlctnPblancDao.selectListCount */ select count(usp.slctn_pblanc_id) as cnt from uspt_slctn_pblanc usp inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = usp.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId}

/** UsptSlctnPblancDao.selectList */ select usp.slctn_pblanc_id , usp.slctn_pblanc_nm , case when usp.ntce = true then '게시중' else '게시안함' end as ntce , ub.bsns_year , ub.bsns_nm , ub.chrg_dept_nm , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit , to_char(to_date(usp.slctn_pblanc_day, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') as slctn_pblanc_day , to_char(usp.created_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as reg_dt , row_number() over (order by usp.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_slctn_pblanc usp inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = usp.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId}
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptSlctnPblancDao.select */ select usp.slctn_pblanc_id , usp.pblanc_id , usp.rcept_odr , usp.sect_id , usp.evl_step_id , usp.evl_last_slctn_id , usp.slctn_pblanc_nm , usp.slctn_pblanc_no , usp.slctn_pblanc_day , usp.slctn_pblanc_sumry , usp.ntce , usp.enabled , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.ordtm_rcrit , ub.bsns_nm , ub.bsns_year , usp.attachment_group_id , ubc.charger_author_cd from uspt_slctn_pblanc usp inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on usp.pblanc_id = ubp.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ubp.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} where slctn_pblanc_id = #{slctnPblancId} and usp.enabled = true

/** UsptSlctnPblancDao.selectFront */ select usp.slctn_pblanc_id , usp.slctn_pblanc_nm , usp.slctn_pblanc_sumry , usp.slctn_pblanc_no , usp.slctn_pblanc_day , ubp.pblanc_nm , ub.chrg_dept_nm , ci.member_id , ci.member_nm , ci.position_nm , ci.enc_email , ci.enc_tel_no , usp.attachment_group_id from uspt_slctn_pblanc usp inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = usp.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubp.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = usp.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.reprsnt_charger = true and ubc.charger_author_cd = 'WRITE' inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id where usp.slctn_pblanc_id = #{slctnPblancId} and usp.ntce = true and usp.enabled = true

/** UsptSlctnPblancDao.selectSlctnList */ select sub.receipt_no , row_number() over (order by sub.receipt_no) as rn from ( select ubpa.receipt_no from uspt_slctn_pblanc usp inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = usp.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubp.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = usp.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.evl_step_id = usp.evl_step_id and uet.sect_id = usp.sect_id and uet.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id and uet.slctn = true where usp.ntce = true and usp.enabled = true and usp.slctn_pblanc_id = #{slctnPblancId} union all select ubpa.receipt_no from uspt_slctn_pblanc usp inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = usp.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubp.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = usp.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.evl_last_slctn_id = usp.evl_last_slctn_id and ulst.slctn = true where usp.ntce = true and usp.enabled = true and usp.slctn_pblanc_id = #{slctnPblancId} ) sub
